meta.title: The Antikernel
meta.description:
A S4x17 Stage 2 Technical Deep Dive

Andrew Zonenberg of ioActive

Kernal mode means you have access to everything. Is it possible to build an OS that has no access to Ring 0? Andrew says yes and calls it the "antikernel" ... an OS with no kernel at all.
